00
47

cd /home/kushal/src/dotnet/myrestaurant/; time bash export.sh > docs/llm/vendor/claude-output.txt; time dotnet --info; time dotnet clean; time dotnet restore; time dotnet build; time dotnet test; time bash run.sh --smoke; time dotnet list package; time dotnet list package --outdated; time bash run.sh --containers-only; time bash scripts/quick_tunnel.sh;
